text:
is a song from Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time. It is track 19 in the album Music from "Shin Evangelion": Evangelion: 3.0+1.0, disc 2. https://vgmdb.net/album/107287

A soldier who could leave behind
Even an injured friend
I wish you'd tell me about your agony
Before departing
 
I’ll never forget you, the lonely human,
Who couldn’t just live for yourself
 
The fact that I was able to get close to you
The fact that I did love you
I’d like to be proud of, till my very very last day
 
A voyager who goes on board a cold dream
To disappear in the universe
People never realize the very thing
That brings a change to them
 
How far is the destination?
Can’t you ever be back again?
 
The fact that I was able to get close to you
The fact that I did love you
